rulings.Case Title: PURE ENTERTAINMENT LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED VS. SHUI KING KWON HOM et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Cross Complainant Stephen Homs Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File Second Amended Cross Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 26, 2018 line 1. CROSS COMPLAINANT STEPHEN HOM's Motion For Leave To File Second Amended Cross Complaint DENIED. Moving party failed to provide a copy of the proposed amended cross-complaint and failed to submit a supporting declaration. Additionally, while the moving party claims that the proposed amendment (to the extent amendments may be discerned from the moving papers) is a compulsory cross-complaint, moving party failed to cite any authority for the proposition that a cross-complaint against a third party may ever be compulsory. (Rutter Guide Civil Procedure Before Trial 6:524). The Court also notes that the Second Amended Cross-Complaint is attached to the reply papers, while the points and authorities and the declaration in reply do not address the procedural requirements and provide no law or evidence on the issue. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 26, 2018 line 3. DEFENDANT MART BAILEY'S Motion To Compel Plaintiff'S Responses To Defendant'S Form Interrogatories - General [Set One]; Form Interrogatories -General [Set Two]; Form Interrogatories -Ud [Set One]; Special Interrogatories [Set One]; To Have All Matters Deemed Admitted From Request For Admissions Set One And Set Two; And Request For Monetary Sanctions transferred to department 505 to be heard on October 30, 2018 at 8:30 a.m. with other pending motion per the order of the Presiding Judge.
